{{Quote|It looks like the Imperials welded an engine booster pack to a simple TIE fighter. Wow, can that thing move!|Gwen Habbert|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''Gwen Habbert''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She participated in the defense of the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] against a wave of [[TIE Experimental M5|TIE Boosters]] and other TIE Experimentals that had been dispatched as part of the [[TIE Experimental Project]].

She was later listed as "Missing In Action".

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
